title: Getting Started with React Router
content: React Router helps you create navigation in your React applications without reloading the page. In this post, we explore how to define routes, navigate between pages, and use dynamic routing.

title: Understanding useEffect in React
content: The useEffect hook allows you to perform side effects in your components. This includes fetching data, updating the DOM, and setting up subscriptions.

title: Why Tailwind CSS is So Popular
content: Tailwind CSS is a utility-first CSS framework that allows you to build modern UIs quickly. Instead of writing custom CSS, you use predefined classes directly in your markup.

title: JavaScript ES6 Features You Should Know
content: ES6 introduced many powerful features like arrow functions, destructuring, spread operators, and modules. These features make JavaScript more expressive and easier to write.

title: Building Your First Web App
content: Starting your first web app can feel overwhelming. This guide walks you through the process of planning, building, and deploying a simple application step by step.
